name: Glazed Cinnamon Rolls
recipeInstructions:
Measure all ingredients, except filling, 2 tablespoons margarine, and vanilla glaze. Place in bread machine in order according to your machine's directions. Select the Dough cycle.
Grease a square pan, 9x9x2 inches. Prepare filling.
Flatten dough with hands or rolling pin into a 9-inch square on lightly floured surface. Spread with 2 tablespoons margarine; sprinkle with Filling. Roll dough up tightly; pinch edge of dough into roll to seal. Cut roll into 1-inch slices. Place in pan. Cover and let rise in warm place 1 to 1 1/4 hours or until doubled.
Heat oven to 375°F. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes or until golden brown. Remove from pan to wire rack. Drizzle vanilla glaze over warm rolls.
Filling:
1/3 Cup brown sugar
2 Teaspoons ground cinnamon
Mix ingredients together.
Vanilla Glaze:
1 Cup powdered sugar
1/2 Teaspoon vanilla extract
1 to 2 Tablespoons milk
Mix all ingredients together until smooth and thin enough to drizzle.
